notableEvents.label: Cole Young GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cole Young grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Dominic Canzone out at 2nd. Cole Young out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cole Young rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cole Young grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Dominic Canzone out at 2nd. Cole Young out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder lines out sharply to third baseman Ramón Urías.

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Alec Burleson out at 1st.
